Summary: R1 – Wearables Sync (Apple Health & Google Fit)
Description: Enable users to connect Apple Health/Google Fit to auto-import steps, sleep, and heart-rate summaries with consent, manual sync, and last-sync display.
Short quiz (6–9 Qs) that outputs a 4-week plan aligned to goal, time, equipment, and dietary preferences.

Epic Name: R1 – AI Meal Planner + Grocery List
Description: Generate 7-day meal plans with macros and a consolidated grocery list; support veg/vegan; swap and regenerate.
Predefined daily habits (Protein, Steps, Sleep, Sunlight) with streaks, gentle nudges, and auto-complete from wearable data.
Personalized trials/prices with experiment assignment, variant-specific value props based on user goal.

As a new user (iOS), I can connect Apple Health (steps, HR summary, sleep) during onboarding to personalize my plan.
AC:
- Status shows Connected
- Last sync timestamp is visible
- Events fired: wearable_sync_connected, wearable_sync_failed
Request and store HealthKit permissions; graceful decline handling.
Consent view with per-signal toggles and link to Privacy Center.
Emit events and verify via QA; add last-sync display.

As a new user (Android), I can connect Google Fit to import steps and sleep.
AC:
- Connected state persists
- Manual 'Sync now' triggers refresh
- Events fired
Implement Fitness API connect and secure token handling.
Fetch last 24h metrics on open and on demand.

As a user, I can toggle which signals (Steps/Sleep/HR) are imported and disconnect any time.
AC:
- Toggle off Sleep prevents new imports
- Disconnect stops fetching and informs about data deletion options

As a new user, I complete a 6–9 Q quiz and receive a 4-week plan with sessions/week aligned to time and equipment.
AC:
- Plan created ≤3 minutes
- 'Start Plan' schedules reminders

Exercises requiring unavailable equipment are auto-swapped to equivalents.
AC:
- No dumbbells? swap to bodyweight variants within same movement pattern.

User inputs calories/macros and dietary preference (veg/vegan/non-veg) to get a 7-day plan (3 meals + optional snacks) within ±5% target.
AC:
- Per-meal macro breakdown
- Regenerate a day

From a generated plan, produce a grouped grocery list with deduplicated quantities.
AC:
- Group by category
- Export/share

Track Protein, Steps, Sleep, Sunlight habits with streaks and weekly summary.
AC:
- Auto-complete from wearable for Steps/Sleep
- Rate-limited nudges (≤1/day)

Personalized value props aligned to goal; assign variants for trial length and pricing.
AC:
- Sticky variant for 30 days
- Events: paywall_shown, paywall_purchased
